description_long: This is a large commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back low-mounted wings, and two prominent turbofan engines mounted under each wing. The aircraft features a distinctive upward-curved wingtip design known as raked wingtips, which enhances aerodynamic efficiency. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail assembly. The fuselage is painted primarily white with blue accents, and the tail fin displays a bold '787' marking, indicating it is a Boeing 787 Dreamliner. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility for the flight crew. The aircraft is designed for long-haul passenger transport and is equipped with retractable tricycle landing gear.
description: A large, white and blue Boeing 787 Dreamliner jet airliner with swept low-mounted wings, underwing turbofan engines, and a conventional tail. Features raked wingtips and a forward-mounted cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, both engines under the wings, and the full wingspan with raked wingtips.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the fuselage, left wing with engine, tail fin with '787' marking, and cockpit windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the right wing with engine, tail fin, and the full length of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, swept-back wings featuring pronounced raked wingtips and slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan underwing engines, one mounted beneath each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple front and side windows integrated into the fuselage.
